name: InputMask
description: InputMask component is used to enter input in a certain format such as numeric, date, currency, email and phone.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: The default value for the input when not controlled by `modelValue`.

props.name: slotChar
props.description: Placeholder character in mask, default is underscore.

props.name: class
props.description: Style class of the input field.

props.name: autoClear
props.description: Clears the incomplete value on blur.

props.name: unmask
props.description: Defines if model sets the raw unmasked value to bound value or the formatted mask value.

props.name: readonly
props.description: Whether the items are clickable or not.

props.name: invalid
props.description: When present, it specifies that the component should have invalid state style.

props.name: size
props.description: Defines the size of the component.

props.name: variant
props.description: Specifies the input variant of the component.

props.name: fluid
props.description: Spans 100% width of the container when enabled.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When present, it specifies that the component should be disabled.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

events.name: value-change
events.description: Emitted when the value changes in uncontrolled mode.

events.name: focus
events.description: Callback to invoke when the component receives focus.

events.name: blur
events.description: Callback to invoke when the component loses focus.

events.name: keydown
events.description: Callback to invoke when a key is pressed.

events.name: keypress
events.description: Callback to invoke when a key that produces a character value is pressed down.

events.name: paste
events.description: Callback to invoke when the user has initiated a 'paste' action through the browser's user interface.

events.name: complete
events.description: Callback to invoke when the mask is completed.
